questions.question: Who won the Champions of the Earth Award, 2024, the UN’s highest environmental recognition?

What significant achievement did Mohun Bagan Super Giant accomplish by winning the ISL 2024-25 title?
questions.option_1: They won the title with a 100% win rate at home.
questions.option_2: They won the title without losing a single match.
questions.option_3: They became the first team to win the ISL title twice.
questions.option_4: They became the second team to win both the ISL League Shield and ISL Cup in the same season.
